name: Library
description:
Welcome to the Library!  You enter through two huge wooden doors and are
immediately overcome by the odor of old books. There are long wooden tables
to either side of you lighted softly by the glow of candlelight and the warm
fire. Around the fireplace you see a huge rug with all of your friends
sitting on it reading there favorite novels. You decide to pick out a book and
join them...Beside the rug on either side of the fireplace you see two
over stuffed chairs... and a special shelf with Leather bound books...
